mapper.sql: SELECT r.record_id, r.patient_id, p.patient_name, r.chief_complaint, r.present_history, r.past_history, r.physical_exam, r.initial_diagnosis, r.operate_doctor_id, r.operate_doctor, r.image_id, r.image_path, r.ai_result_path, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark FROM medical_record r LEFT JOIN medical_patient p ON p.patient_id = r.patient_id
mapper.select: SELECT patient_id AS patientId, patient_name AS patientName, attending_doctor_id AS attendingDoctorId, attending_doctor AS attendingDoctor FROM medical_patient WHERE patient_id = #{patientId}

SELECT patient_id AS patientId, patient_name AS patientName, attending_doctor_id AS attendingDoctorId, attending_doctor AS attendingDoctor FROM medical_patient
AND patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{patientName}, '%')
AND attending_doctor_id = #{attendingDoctorId}
ORDER BY create_time DESC, patient_id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT id, image_path AS imagePath, image_name AS imageName FROM chest_xray
AND (image_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR image_path LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO medical_record
patient_id, chief_complaint, present_history, past_history, physical_exam, initial_diagnosis, operate_doctor_id, operate_doctor, image_id, image_path, ai_result_path, create_by, create_time, remark,
#{patientId}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{presentHistory}, #{pastHistory}, #{physicalExam}, #{initialDiagnosis}, #{operateDoctorId}, #{operateDoctor}, #{imageId}, #{imagePath}, #{aiResultPath}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM medical_record WHERE record_id IN
#{recordId}
